Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Caela]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Caela is a doll with short, curly blond hair, a sky blue bonnet, and a matching dress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Caela is being cared for by Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Caela claims to hear the voice of the wind and speak the words of the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Caela provides Simon with advice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Caela whispered that people were about to come in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Caela is a doll whose face shows an expression of peace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Caela is an advisor to Simon who replaced Otoku.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Caela is located on Simon's belt and can communicate with him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Caela can return to the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Caela tells Simon that he killed an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Caela advises Simon to head for the Travelers on top of the canyon.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Caela is currently with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Caela is someone whom the narrator wishes were present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Caela communicates with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Caela is someone who would respond to Simon with a joke or sarcasm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Simon carried Caela in one hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Caela is a blond doll in a powder-blue dress and bonnet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Caela is a girl and a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Caela wields a Dragon’s Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Caela warns Simon that he has about two minutes before he dies, goes insane, or merges with the Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Caela is a talking doll.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Caela is a doll that communicates with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Caela is a character who could respond to Simon's thoughts.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Caela has curly blond hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Caela is a doll wearing a blue bonnet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Caela has wooden hands and wears a bonnet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Caela communicates via a mental voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Caela is a character who provides tactical directions to Kai during his fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Caela is a companion to Simon who can sit on his shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Caela is present and observing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Caela tells Simon he is out of time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Caela observes Simon's white chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Caela is a doll that Leah was holding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Caela has a blue bonnet and a painted wooden frown.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
